# Jungle Pixels / Shrinklet

Shrinklet is a macOS app by Jungle Pixels for private local compression of PDFs, images, videos, and audio. The app focuses on simple presets, batch workflows, review-before-sharing, and clear before-and-after file savings.

Important pages:
- Home: https://www.junglepixels.com/
- Support: https://www.junglepixels.com/support.html
- PDF Compressor for Mac: https://www.junglepixels.com/pdf-compressor-mac.html
- Image Compressor for Mac: https://www.junglepixels.com/image-compressor-mac.html
- Video Compressor for Mac: https://www.junglepixels.com/video-compressor-mac.html
- Audio Compressor for Mac: https://www.junglepixels.com/audio-compressor-mac.html
